user.title: Connection
user.description: Configure the connection to Oref alerts API. Leave proxy URL empty for direct connection (Israel only).

areas.title: Location Filter
areas.description:
Choose how to filter alerts by location:

**Districts** — monitor entire regions (e.g. all of Haifa district).
**Cities** — pick specific cities for precise alerts.

You can use either or both. If cities are selected, only those cities will trigger alerts. Leave both empty for nationwide monitoring.

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Select which alert categories to monitor. Leave empty for all categories.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Oref API. If you are outside Israel, configure a proxy URL.

init.description:
